summoning
Heart of Permafrost

Triggers: Duration of the battle

Spirit of Ice
The powers of ice grant special abilities to the artifact's owner:
* The unit cannot be frozen or affected with deep freeze.
When attacking, the unit has a 35% chance to cast deep freeze effect upon a random enemy unit for 3 sec. For the duration, the frozen unit is unable to move or attack, and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the target of the ability explodes and receives 300000 magic damage. Icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearest enemy units. On hit, icicles deal 350000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec., and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 50% for 3 sec.

- When any unit on the battlefield is frozen, the artifact's owner deals 400000 pure damage to all frozen enemy units on the battlefield. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The ability triggers at most once per 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
